item.title: LLMs Improving LLMs: Agentic Discovery for Test-Time Scaling
item.description: 📄 New in cs.CL — Test-time scaling (TTS) has become an effective approach for improving large language model performance by allocating additional computation during inference. However, existing TTS strategies are largely hand-crafted: researchers manually design reasoning patterns and tune heuristics by intuition...

item.title: Flow-OPD: On-Policy Distillation for Flow Matching Models
item.description: 📄 New in cs.CV, cs.AI — Existing Flow Matching (FM) text-to-image models suffer from two critical bottlenecks under multi-task alignment: the reward sparsity induced by scalar-valued rewards, and the gradient interference arising from jointly optimizing heterogeneous objectives, which together give rise to a 'seesaw eff...

item.title: SCOPE: Structured Decomposition and Conditional Skill Orchestration for Complex Image Generation
item.description: 📄 New in cs.CV, cs.AI — While text-to-image models have made strong progress in visual fidelity, faithfully realizing complex visual intents remains challenging because many requirements must be tracked across grounding, generation, and verification. We refer to these requirements as semantic commitments and formalize t...

item.title: Normalizing Trajectory Models
item.description: 📄 New in cs.CV, cs.LG — Diffusion-based models decompose sampling into many small Gaussian denoising steps -- an assumption that breaks down when generation is compressed to a few coarse transitions. Existing few-step methods address this through distillation, consistency training, or adversarial objectives, but sacrifi...

item.title: Fast Byte Latent Transformer
item.description: 📄 New in cs.CL, cs.AI — Recent byte-level language models (LMs) match the performance of token-level models without relying on subword vocabularies, yet their utility is limited by slow, byte-by-byte autoregressive generation. We address this bottleneck in the Byte Latent Transformer (BLT) through new training and gener...

item.title: STARFlow2: Bridging Language Models and Normalizing Flows for Unified Multimodal Generation
item.description: 📄 New in cs.CV, cs.LG — Deep generative models have advanced rapidly across text and vision, motivating unified multimodal systems that can understand, reason over, and generate interleaved text-image sequences. Most existing approaches combine autoregressive language modeling with diffusion-based image generators, inhe...

item.title: Multi-Objective Constraint Inference using Inverse reinforcement learning
item.description: 📄 New in cs.AI, cs.LG — Constraint inference is widely considered essential to align reinforcement learning agents with safety boundaries and operational guidelines by observing expert demonstrations. However, existing approaches typically assume homogeneous demonstrations (i.e., generated by a single expert or multiple...
